# Size

**Data field**

An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the elementary stream descriptor atom.

## Data fields

- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Version**: An unsigned 32-bit integer set to zero.
- **Elementary stream descriptor**: An elementary stream descriptor for MPEG-4 audio.
